message:
feat(index-worker): add batch job processing and content index integration

Transform index-worker from single-file extraction to batch processor that
writes extracted content directly to Tantivy content index.

Major enhancements:
- Accept job file via --job-file (JSON array of extraction jobs)
- Write extracted docs to content index (--index-dir required)
- Support both single-file (--path) and batch modes
- Add commit-every flag for incremental commits
- Add JSON output mode for structured results
- JobSpec and OutputRecord structs for serialization

Worker now creates Tantivy index writer, processes jobs, and commits
documents. Enables batch indexing workflow where service spawns workers
with job files instead of per-file process spawns.

Related: c00.5.1 (worker job contract), 24fd76f (serde deps), a7d9026 (IndexWriter export)
